Random Civ Selector

Your Civilisation

Press Choose Civilisation to spin the wheel of fate. The selector respects your whitelist, blacklist and probability weights set below.

Spin the wheel to receive your civilisation.

All Civilisations

  • Click once to whitelist a civ (⭐ golden star). Only whitelisted civs can be drawn, unless the whitelist is empty. All others will be greyed out.
  • Click twice to blacklist it (✕ excluded from draws). These civs will not be chosen by the randomizer.
  • Click three times to reset to default.
  • Adjust the multiplier below each civ to change how often it can appear.

Game History

Your last games, most recent first. History influences the auto-weight calculation and is stored locally in your browser.

    No games recorded yet. Spin the wheel or add one manually above.

    All data is stored locally in your browser. No information is sent to any server.

    Site has been generated to 90% by Claude. Civ icons are from AoECompanion. and the wiki.
